bounded_claim: On the bounded Phase Alpha recall rerun seam, selected runtime evidence can show whether the rerun stayed inspect-capsule-expand, used landed memo objects only, and avoided stronger source escalation or hidden-state recovery. This is memo-recall hygiene evidence only.
environment_invariants: same owner-local writeback boundary for Phase Alpha
same human-review requirement before promotion into explicit memo objects
same memo-first rerun posture: inspect then capsule then expand
environment_deltas: next_pass_brief and rerun verification surfaces preserve different bounded evidence roles inside the same rerun lane
do_not_overread: does not prove broad memory quality
does not prove final answer quality
does not replace return-anchor, scope, approval, or verification evals
